task_updates.executor_notes: Added shared bulk helpers in `bulk-utils.ts`, replaced the inline PropertiesPanel helper import, and verified the new tab helper keeps `position` visible for visual-track selections including text clips.

Added `handleUpdateClipsDeep` with per-clip patch generation from `current.meta[clipId]`, then exposed it through `useTimelineState` and `useTimelineState.types` so nested bulk patches are not shared across clips.
Added `handleResetClipsPosition` to clear the same eight position/crop fields as the single-clip reset path for every valid selected clip, and wired it through the editor context types/state.

Implemented `moveSelectedClipsToTrack` with per-kind planning and blocking, exposed it through timeline state/context, and updated keyboard handling so arrow-key track moves operate on the full selection.
Added `handleSplitClipsAtPlayhead` with silent skipping for non-intersecting clips, wired it through the editor context, and added the batch context-menu action in `ClipAction`/`TimelineEditor`.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: `getBulkVisibleTabs` adds `position` whenever any selected clip is on a visual track, so an all-text visual multi-selection still shows the Position tab.

`handleUpdateClipsDeep` builds a distinct `metaUpdates` entry for each valid clip ID from `current.meta[clipId]` before calling `applyTimelineEdit`, so nested bulk patches are per clip rather than shared.
`handleResetClipsPosition` sets `x`, `y`, `width`, `height`, `cropTop`, `cropBottom`, `cropLeft`, and `cropRight` to `undefined` for each valid selected clip.

`moveSelectedClipsToTrack` computes target rows per source-row group and only executes a kind-group when every group in that kind has a valid adjacent track; visual and audio selections are evaluated independently.
`handleSplitClipsAtPlayhead` first checks which selected clips intersect the current playhead via the current row actions and silently skips any selected clips that do not intersect.
